refarch-gateway/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JaCoCo version to a snapshot release compatible with Java 21.
refarch-gateway/pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions may fail to instrument or analyze classes compiled with Java 21 due to bytecode version incompatibilities.
